subject: fix(debug): redact hash in Env tab to match report generation
body:
Env tab displayed URL with hash fragment visible — could expose tokens
in hash-based auth flows if screen is shared or screenshotted. Report
generation (debugGenerateReport) already redacted both query params and
hash. Now consistent: both show ?[redacted] and #[redacted].

Tags: debug, security
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
